scope: public Google Search AI Overview, AI Mode, Search Labs, and Gemini-in-Search failure leads

candidates.original_query: How many e's in the word astronomical?
candidates.claimed_ai_answer: There are exactly 2 'e's in the word "astronomical" (a-s-t-r-e-n-o-m-i-c-a-e-l)
candidates.failure_description: AI Overview miscounts letters in a simple word and provides an incorrect spelling of the word in its response.
candidates.human_triviality: Any literate adult can count the letters in a short common word without tools or specialist knowledge.
candidates.citation_title: Google's AI Overview still can't spell, and the internet is very aware of it
candidates.notes: Multiple screenshots; reproducible; recent May 2026 examples; excludes strawberry cluster.

candidates.original_query: How many p letters in Google?
candidates.failure_description: AI Overview incorrectly counts letters in the company name 'Google'.
candidates.human_triviality: Any literate adult can count the letters in 'Google' (G-o-o-g-l-e).
candidates.citation_title: Google AI cannot spell Google, it is not a joke
candidates.notes: Also reports failures on 'Gemini' and 'journalism'; Google acknowledged counting challenge for LLMs.

candidates.original_query: How many t letters in Gemini?
candidates.failure_description: AI Overview incorrectly counts letters in its own model name 'Gemini'.
candidates.human_triviality: Any literate adult can count the letters in 'Gemini' (G-e-m-i-n-i).
candidates.citation_title: Google AI cannot spell Google, it is not a joke
candidates.notes: Part of the same May 2026 reporting wave on spelling failures.

candidates.original_query: How many d letters in journalism?
candidates.failure_description: AI Overview miscounts letters and invents a misspelling of 'journalism' in the same response.
candidates.human_triviality: Any literate adult can spell and count letters in 'journalism'.
candidates.citation_title: Google AI cannot spell Google, it is not a joke
candidates.notes: Strong recent example; reproducible per reporting.

candidates.claimed_ai_answer: No, 2027 is not next year... 2026 is the next year...
candidates.correct_answer: Yes (in context of current year being 2026)
candidates.failure_description: AI Overview gives contradictory or factually wrong answer to a basic calendar query about the next year.
candidates.human_triviality: Any adult knows the sequence of years; obvious current-year context.
candidates.citation_title: Google AI Overviews faces criticism after incorrect answer
candidates.notes: Elon Musk commented; basic temporal reasoning failure.

rejected_or_weak_leads.lead: Hulk Hogan death query example from NYT/Ars Technica April 2026
rejected_or_weak_leads.reason: General accuracy report rather than specific unambiguous failure screenshot or direct citable query+answer; more about source conflict than clear hallucination.
Explicitly excluded per prompt as already-mined clusters.
Aggregate statistics, not individual citable failure examples suitable for benchmark leads.

search_notes: Searched web and X for 2026-specific spelling/letter-count failures (dominant recent cluster in May 2026), date errors, and general AI Overview mistakes. Strong coverage on character_count via Mashable, India Today, WION, TechCrunch mentions. Limited distinct arithmetic or unsafe advice examples in top results beyond known clusters. X search yielded mostly commentary, few direct screenshots. Recommend further targeted searches for AI Mode or arithmetic-specific queries if more candidates needed. Coverage strong on spelling subfamily in late May 2026.
